title: Workshops of Doom
body:
The Illagers have taken over Santa's Workshops and are manufacturing not toys, but DOOM.

![](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/Vyic2t6w/images/af223e074301a85f4796f9190e4cdc31d6a6e3f6.png)

They have also started scouring other areas for natural resources.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Vyic2t6w/images/13f761827ffa112eebd5614bf522fdcd785d33db.png)

Workshops of Doom adds these structures:

* Quarry structures generate in plains and deserts.

* Mines structures generate in badlands and mountains.

* Workshop structures generate in icy biomes.

Be wary that mines and workshops are quite large and may take several seconds to generate when they are encountered. Server ops can pregenerate them by /locate-ing the structure and /tp-ing to the given location.
